description: Plan-view film darkroom: doorless maze light-trap entrance (walking path arrow), DRY SIDE top wall (loading bench, light-tight film bin, cassette stack w/ cyan latent-image glow, pass-thru hatch), WET SIDE bottom wall (sink + DEV/STOP/FIX/WASH tank line, film hanger dipping into DEV), two deep-red safelight cones over bench and tanks, light-trapped vent louver; white light-leak wedge + alert triangle at hatch seam.
